message:
test(abi): expand time/inet/signal/socket test coverage (+2088 lines)

Massively expand four thin test files:
- time_abi_test.rs (8→38): time, clock_gettime, gmtime_r, mktime,
  timegm, difftime, gettimeofday, clock_getres, nanosleep, asctime_r,
  ctime_r, strftime, timespec_get/getres, tzset
- inet_abi_test.rs: htons/htonl, inet_pton/ntop, inet_aton/ntoa,
  if_nametoindex/indextoname, getservbyname_r/getservbyport_r
- signal_abi_test.rs: sigset ops, sigandset/sigorset, sigabbrev_np,
  sigaction, kill, sigprocmask, sigpending, sighold/sigrelse
- socket_abi_test.rs: socket creation, bind, listen, socketpair,
  send/recv, shutdown, getsockname, setsockopt, sendto/recvfrom UDP,
  accept4, connect+accept TCP e2e

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
